author: olofhaglund
description: Pushes flashcards from notes to Anki. The flashcards are bashed on code blocks annotated with flashcard. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Olof Haglund
manifest.description: Pushes flashcards from notes to Anki. The flashcards are bashed on code blocks annotated with flashcard.
manifest.name: Anki Flashcards Sync

name: Anki Flashcards Sync

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
The first release for the one-way sync between Obsidan an Anki.

An plugin that bases flash cards based on Frontmatter and code blocks.

This first version supports syncing the following:

- Note Types
- Note Type Fields (Automatically inferred based on card specification.)
- Note Type Cards (Structure and style)
- Flash Cards
